statement: In every magma, Equation 3838 (`x * y = (z * w) * (x * z)`) implies Equation 4408 (`x * (x * y) = (y * y) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0635
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op z w) (op x z))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x (op x y)) = (op (op y y) x)
